title:
I would like to gain my sons birth time 
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## I would like to gain my sons birth time
I would like to get information on my sons time of birth
I would like to have a record of his exact birth time as a matter of record as he would like me to look at his astrology chart but this not possible unless I have his time of birth.
By having his birth time I will be able to have his astrology chart drawn up for him

### Response from Te Whatu Ora Health New Zealand
Status More information required about request
Comments Good Morning

I hope this email finds you well.

I am emailing on behalf of the Health New Zealand (HNZ) – National Privacy Office.

We wish to advice that the HNZ Official Information Act team has transferred the below request to us as it relates to personal information.

In order for us to direct this request to the hospital to progress, please provide us with the following information:

•	Patient’s name, DOB, and NHI (if known) 
•	Which hospital/district this information request relates to (e.g. Canterbury)
•	Requestor’s email address 

Please note that under the Privacy Act 2020 we are required to validate the requestor’s identity before releasing personal information to them.

We look forward to hearing from you.

Kind regards

HNZ Privacy Office 
Office of the Chief Executive

#### Likely Source Agency
Te Whatu Ora Health New Zealand
